arts.ttl: Arsenal news: Gunners star makes new position claim as defender handed England warning
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta has seen several of his first-team stars link up with their international squads, with some in UEFA Nations League action and others playing World Cup qualifiers

arts.ttl: England & Wales begin World Cup qualifying - all you need to know
arts.sum: European qualification for the 2026 World Cup begins this week, with England and Wales among the nations in action. BBC Sport looks at all you need to know.

arts.ttl: Morgan Rogers impressed by England boss Thomas Tuchel’s ‘aura and demeanour’
arts.sum: The German began work as Gareth Southgate’s successor in January.

arts.ttl: England stars' immediate reaction to Thomas Tuchel speaks volumes on World Cup hopes
arts.sum: Thomas Tuchel will take charge of England for the first time on Friday night, with his assembled squad already feeling the presence and aura of their highly rated coach

arts.ttl: England star plots Jude Bellingham heartbreak and says 'he's always had a mouth on him'
arts.sum: Aston Villa midfielder Morgan Rogers is big friends with Real Madrid superstar Jude Bellingham and they are on course to meet in the Champions League semi-finals if they both get through

arts.ttl: Thomas Tuchel warned over England failure as Harry Redknapp aims Coronation Street dig
arts.sum: Former West Ham and Tottenham manager Harry Redknapp also said new England boss Thomas Tuchel should not be judged playing “two useless teams” in World Cup qualifiers over the next week

arts.ttl: England star Morgan Rogers reflects on 'struggle' to reach top after Man City rejection
arts.sum: Morgan Rogers, 22, was on Manchester City’s books as a teenager and played through all the England age groups but found it difficult to realise his full potential

arts.ttl: Jordan Pickford sets ambitious new England target ahead of bringing up new landmark
arts.sum: Jordan Pickford is now targeting 100 England caps with the Everton goalkeeper set to move ahead of Gordon Banks when the Three Lions take on Albania on Friday night

arts.ttl: Lee Carsley hopes to ‘earn the right’ to be senior England manager again
arts.sum: Carsley preparing for first game back with under-21s ‘I feel happy and trusted doing what I’m doing,’ he says Lee Carsley has said he has ambitions to take charge of England’s senior side again but insisted he was happy to be back with the under-21s as they prepare to defend their European Championship title. Carsley stepped in as interim manager to replace Gareth Southgate after Euro 2024 and helped England to finish top of their Nations League group before being replaced by Thomas Tuchel. The former Republic of Ireland midfielder is back with the under-21s, the side he led to a first European title triumph in 2023, before the finals in Slovakia in June. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Thomas Tuchel orders England players to talk more with each other on pitch
arts.sum: More communication wanted in difficult moments Tuchel shows squad Euro 2024 final interactions graph Thomas Tuchel has demanded that England’s players speak to one another more during difficult periods in games, as he starts his quest to win the World Cup next year. The new head coach underlined the importance he attaches to communication by showing his squad a graph detailing how interactions reduced significantly in the second half of the Euro 2024 final defeat by Spain. Continue reading...
